query:
SELECT id, name FROM commercial_assets ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20;
SELECT id, name FROM deals WHERE name LIKE '%Sprint%' OR name LIKE '%Prefill%' OR name LIKE '%Share Test%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20;
